title: VillagerControlPanel
description: This plugin gives admins a clean, fast GUI to find, sort, filter and manage every villager
body:
VillagerControlPanel is a lightweight GUI plugin that lets server admins easily find, filter, sort, and manage villagers across all worlds.

✔ Filter by world & profession
✔ Sort by level, trades, or world
✔ Teleport, pull, freeze, and highlight villagers
✔ Manage trades (enable/disable & reset uses)
✔ Clean GUI • Spigot/Paper 1.18+

Perfect for survival and economy servers that want full control over villagers without commands.
